Night at the Museum (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $250,863,268Details
International Box Office $328,583,139
Worldwide Box Office $579,446,407
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $155,902,296
Total $155,902,296
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,433,781 (12.1% of total gross)
Legs:6.82 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$110,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,685 opening theaters/3,768 max. theaters, 9.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $446,237,658

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 22nd, 2006 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
December 22nd, 2006 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: December 26th, 2006 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 24th, 2007 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for mild action, language and brief rude humor
Running Time: 108 minutes
Franchise: Night at the Museum
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: Manhattan, New York City
Plot point: Living Toys, Mummy, Museum
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Time period setting: 1930s, 2000s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, Ingenious Film Partners, 1492 Pictures, 21 Laps Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 22nd, 2006 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox

International Releases: December 26th, 2006 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 24th, 2007 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for mild action, language and brief rude humor
Running Time: 108 minutes
Franchise: Night at the Museum
Film format: IMAX: DMR
